task_completion.description: Open CAMEO Data Manager and navigate to the Community Resources module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CAMEO Data Manager application window is open, and the user is in the 'Resources' or 'Community Resources' section, ready to add a new record.

task_completion.description: Enter the resource name and category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Name field contains 'Metro Lifeline Ambulance Service' and the Category field contains 'EMS/Ambulance/Rescue' (or similar expected keywords like EMS, Ambulance, Medical, Rescue).
The Address fields contain '2710 Commerce Park Drive', City contains 'Jefferson City', State contains 'MO', and Zip/Postal Code contains '65109'.

task_completion.description: Enter the contact person, title, and phone numbers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Contact name field contains 'Captain Diana Hartwell', Title contains 'EMS Operations Director', Phone contains '(573) 635-7820', and 24-Hour Phone contains '(573) 635-7911'.

task_completion.description: Enter the specific notes about the resource.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Notes or Comments field contains the text: 'Contracted provider for EPCRA industrial corridor. 2 ALS units, 1 BLS unit available 24/7. Hazmat medical support certified.'

task_completion.description: Save the new EMS resource record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A saved record view, a success confirmation, or the new entry 'Metro Lifeline Ambulance Service' appearing in the list of community resources.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the graphical user interface of CAMEO Data Manager.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the CAMEO Data Manager forms being filled out, rather than terminal commands or scripts modifying a .mer file directly.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual CAMEO Data Manager software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window clearly belongs to CAMEO Data Manager (look for CAMEO branding or standard database form layouts), not a generic text editor or spreadsheet.

integrity.description: Data was entered into the appropriate form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text is properly distributed across the specific form fields (Name, Address, Phone, etc.) rather than pasted as a single block of text into a single field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: CAMEO Data Manager is a legitimate emergency response database tool. The expected category keywords are 'EMS', 'Ambulance', 'Medical', or 'Rescue'. The city 'Jefferson City', state 'MO', and area code '573' are valid and should be entered exactly as specified. The agent must use the CAMEO Data Manager UI to enter this data.
